records.ety: [OE. ascheler, achiler, OF. aiseler, fr. aiselle, dim. of ais plank, fr. L. axis, assis, plank, axle. See Axle.]

defs: Hewn or squared stone; also, masonry made of squared or hewn stone.
In the United States especially, a thin facing of squared and dressed stone upon a wall of rubble or brick.
quotes: Rough ashlar, a block of freestone as brought from the quarry. When hammer-dressed it is known as common ashlar.
